text.title: Strangler-Fig Migration Playbook Output Contract
text.summary: Defines the migration artifact bundle: slice plan, cutover runbook, exit-criteria record.

forbidden.pattern: cutover_runbook missing rollback_command on any step
kill_switch_test_passed_at missing OR > 7 days before cutover (stale test)
exit_criteria_signoff with all three flags true but client_architect_signature_date missing
dual_write enabled OR shadow_read configured with no end_date — both must have explicit termination dates

allowed-transformations.transformation: Burn-in window may extend beyond 7 days if error_rate_delta_percent > 5% or p99_latency_delta_percent > 10% at day 7.
For ultra-low-traffic slices (< 1 rps), use a percentage rollout (1% → 10% → 50% → 100%) over the burn-in window instead of 100% from day 1.
A "slice" may bundle 2-3 tightly-coupled routes if they share a single bounded context — coupling_depth applies to the bundle.

list.item: monolith inventory covers ≥ 95% of routes/jobs (no "we'll get to them later" hidden slices)
slice_scoring_table sorted by selection_order matches r1 (low-coupling rails first)
each slice has a cutover_runbook with rollback per step AND a tested kill-switch
exit_criteria_signoff signed by named client architect
dual-write and shadow-read both have explicit termination dates
